extraction.one_line_summary: MOLLEMA attacked solo 45km from the finish on undulating terrain before the final Cat-2 climb, holding off a chase group to win Stage 14.
tactical_patterns: MOLLEMA launched winning move 45km out before final Cat-2, suggesting rivals underestimated his climbing ability on long solo effort.
Peloton allowed breakaway only 40 seconds for over an hour, revealing teams feared losing stage control on transitional terrain.
Sprint teams chased initial break near intermediate sprint despite no GC threat, exposing green jersey points obsession tactical error.

rider_signals.MOLLEMA Bauke: positive: Won stage solo from 45km out with Cat-2 climb remaining, showing exceptional sustained power on transitional stages
rider_signals.MARTIN Guillaume: positive: Jumped from ninth to second overall at 4:04, revealing GC form peaking at two-week mark
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: Claimed polka dots from QUINTANA despite recent crash, demonstrating recovery capacity and KOM-hunting aggression
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: Lost polka dots after five days, consistently dropping on climbs signals serious form deficit
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: neutral: Extended green jersey lead to commanding 279 points, team still burning matches chasing sprint intermediates
